guidance: Date/time, timezone, user-visible tool or endpoint, symbols tested, requested input, returned output, and result state.
Raw JSON, CSV output, screenshot, copied app error text, or downloaded file produced by the test.
If using a third-party app symbol lookup box, do not call Search/Screener/Chart URL failures Yahoo endpoint failures unless the app supports direct URLs.
For batch quote tests, list both requested symbols and returned symbols. Missing requested symbols are a distinct finding.
Use the interpretation rules. Null result, empty result, HTTP error, and missing-symbol result are different conditions.
Where practical, repeat the test later or with a control symbol before promoting an observation to a confirmed change.
Do not include private account data, credentials, cookies, or proprietary app source code in public observations.
